agent_recommendation: Record v5d as the selected finished visual direction and stop routing it back into open-ended iteration.
current_style_assessment: The v5d redraw is the human-selected finished direction from the v5d/v5e/v5f comparison. v5f remains useful comparison evidence, but it is not the selected direction because the human assessment is that it still reads unfinished.
human_question: Which v5 visual direction should remain the selected working direction after v5d/v5e/v5f comparison?
alternatives: v5d selected as finished visual direction
v5f rejected/deferred as unfinished art-direction lane

human_choice_boundary.reason: v5d has the finished quality the human wants; v5f still feels incomplete after automation loops.

follow_up.implementation_slice: Treat v5d as the selected visual direction. Do not continue promoting v5f unless a later task explicitly requests a new v5f rebuild from the v5d standard.
